title: OpenClaw Security Risks: 6 Dangers of Autonomous AI Agents
summary: IBM Technology examines OpenClaw security risks in autonomous AI agents, covering vulnerabilities including prompt injection and credential exposure. The video discusses how agent autonomy, tools, and memory create real-world security challenges and provides guidance on safe deployment practices.
